entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: Wild and cultivated genotypes of wheat studied for abiotic stress tolerance

entities.name: STARCH
entities.description: The primary determinant of wheat grain yield, contributing significantly to dry weight

entities.name: WHEAT GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of grain produced per unit area, determined by starch

entities.name: GRAIN DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of the grain after water removal, influenced by starch

entities.name: ENDOSPERM DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of the endosperm after water removal, influenced by starch

entities.name: STARCH BIOSYNTHETIC PATHWAY
entities.description: The biological process of starch synthesis regulated by enzymes

entities.name: SOLUBLE STARCH SYNTHASE
entities.description: A crucial enzyme in the starch biosynthetic pathway sensitive to environmental change

entities.name: SSI GENE
entities.description: The gene encoding soluble starch synthase I, analyzed for haplotypes

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL CHANGE
entities.description: External factors that affect the activity of soluble starch synthase and grain filling

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of wheat genotypes to withstand non-biological stress

entities.name: SNPS
entities.description: Single nucleotide polymorphisms identified in the SSI gene

entities.name: AEGILOPS TAUSCHII
entities.description: A wild progenitor species of wheat

entities.name: AEGILOPS SPELTOIDES
entities.description: A wild progenitor species of wheat

entities.name: TRITICUM DICOCCOIDES
entities.description: A wild progenitor species of wheat

entities.name: IMPALA
entities.description: A cultivated wheat genotype

entities.name: C591
entities.description: A cultivated wheat genotype

entities.name: GT5 DOMAIN
entities.description: A specific domain in the SSI gene where SNPs were identified

entities.name: GRAIN FILLING
entities.description: The process of accumulating dry matter in the grain

entities.name: STARCH DEPOSITION
entities.description: The process of starch accumulation in the grain

entities.name: MOLECULAR AND PHENOTYPIC EVALUATION
entities.description: The process used to validate the effects of SSI gene haplotypes
